overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character traverses sidewalks, crosses streets, and moves through an urban environment with holographic advertisements and towering buildings.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past neon signs and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking in the same direction ahead of the character

elevated highway structure with yellow trim
circular concrete planter with palm tree
tall building covered in colorful neon advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a neon-lit sidewalk in a futuristic downtown area. The Titan billboard is visible on the left while the character passes other pedestrians and approaches a street crossing.

events.description: character steps onto yellow crosswalk to cross the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a marked crosswalk

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving past on the street

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes
covered waiting area with glass panels

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street using a yellow crosswalk, passing a moving vehicle, and reaches the opposite sidewalk near a bus stop shelter.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with bus stop and holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past a bus stop and holographic advertisement kiosk

black metal barrier separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the sidewalk past a holographic advertisement kiosk and metal railings, with parked cars visible along the street and neon signs illuminating the buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered area beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: entering darker shaded area beneath the concrete overpass

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass where lighting becomes darker and more shadowed

entered.detail: massive elevated highway structure casting shadows over the street
illuminated storefront sign with Asian characters

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a large concrete overpass, entering a darker, more enclosed space with reduced neon lighting. The Enjachi sign becomes visible in the distance as the character moves through the underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with pedestrian stairs and crosswalk signals

events.description: character stops at the crosswalk to observe the surroundings and traffic signals

agents.ego_description: stopping at a crosswalk near stairs and looking around at the intersection

entered.detail: concrete staircase with metal railings leading upward
vertical signal pole with illuminated walk sign

segments.scene_description: The character stops at a crosswalk near a stairway, observing the traffic signals and the surrounding neon-lit buildings. The area transitions from the dark underpass back to the illuminated street level with visible crosswalk markings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant, neon-lit futuristic downtown that briefly dips into a shadowed underpass before returning to the illuminated street. It begins with the character walking along a crowded sidewalk past a Titan billboard, moving steadily toward a street crossing. As the character traverses a yellow crosswalk and passes a moving vehicle, the scene opens up to a sidewalk featuring a bus stop shelter and a glowing holographic advertisement kiosk. The camera then follows the character as the bright city lights fade, transitioning into the darker, enclosed space beneath a concrete overpass where an Enjachi sign appears in the distance. Finally, the environment shifts back to the brilliance of the street level as the character stops at a crosswalk near a stairway, surrounded by traffic signals and towering neon buildings.
